text:
Done. The `from` and `to` sections now have fully independent input modes:

- Each has its own toggle button (token ↔ USD)
- Switching one doesn't affect the other
- When you type a USD amount in `to`, it calculates how much of the `from` token you need and triggers a quote
- The quote response always updates both `toAmount` and `toUsdAmount` so whichever mode you're in shows the correct value
